plugins.name: wzrdx-kb
plugins.notes: KB-first doctrine. Installed and registered by `wzrdx setup`.

plugins.name: company-profile
plugins.notes: Company base context (name, market, customers, niche, objectives). Ships with the `wzrdx company` command.

plugins.name: legal
plugins.notes: Compliance anchor: contract review, compliance tracking, risk assessment, vendor checks. Jurisdiction checklists: GDPR/NIS2/AI Act/DORA/ISO 27001-20000-22301/SOC 2/PCI DSS.

plugins.name: operations
plugins.notes: Process docs, vendor evaluation, change requests, runbooks. CQO uses this to read and cross-reference COO-authored POPs during audits.

plugins.name: data
plugins.notes: Quality analytics: defects, NCRs, rework rate, SPC. Shared with ops, rh and growth.

plugins.name: claude-skills
plugins.notes: Shared with rh — cherry-pick Compliance OS (9 skills) + Regulatory & Quality Management (18 skills incl. ISO). Vet each skill individually before adoption; third-party packs execute code.

plugins.name: compliance-auditor
plugins.notes: SOC 2 evidence collection. Vet repo before install — third-party packs execute code.
plugins.source: TBD — candidate repos to vet (VoltAgent/rohitg00 toolkits; mcpmarket.com skill-auditor)

plugins.name: skill-auditor
plugins.notes: Quality scoring of our own wzrdxOS skills. Vet repo before install.
plugins.source: TBD — candidate repos to vet (VoltAgent/rohitg00 toolkits; mcpmarket.com skill-auditor)

plugins.name: claude-cowork-regulated-workloads
plugins.notes: ⚠️ Cowork currently excluded from audit logs / Compliance API / data exports — regulated quality/compliance workloads must NOT run there until those events reach the Compliance API. Validate before any formal compliance use.
